source_note: All rows are small-scale Work4 AIR-VLA D0 engineering diagnostics. They are not AIR-VLA+ reproduction or paper-level performance claims.

iterations.label: ef_resmove
iterations.hypothesis: Target-conditioned residual movement should improve short-horizon UAV approach.
iterations.media_status: local output videos exist under the source result directory
iterations.boundary: no arm signal and no completion signal

iterations.label: phase_hybrid_early_close
iterations.hypothesis: Early phase closure and arm hold should expose manipulation-side signal.
iterations.mechanism_source: A/B/C 2-episode gate showed B needed close timing inside the 20-step cap
iterations.media_status: local output videos exist under the source result directory
iterations.decision: retain as arm diagnostic, not standalone method
iterations.boundary: no UAV signal and no completion signal

iterations.label: mini_dual_head
iterations.hypothesis: Movement smoothing and replay stitching may stabilize action chunks.
iterations.media_status: local output videos exist under the source result directory

iterations.label: ef_resmove_phase
iterations.hypothesis: Movement residual and phase control are complementary and should increase total engineering score.
iterations.mechanism_source: A had UAV signal and B had arm signal under separate gates
iterations.media_status: local output videos exist under the source result directory
iterations.boundary: no completion signal and first episode loses UAV signal

iterations.label: ef_resmove_phase_first_attempt
iterations.hypothesis: The same A+B policy should run through the evaluator.
iterations.media_status: no media because evaluator crashed before episode output

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_speed005
iterations.hypothesis: Closing only after the estimated UAV-target distance enters the evaluator scoring band should remove premature action frames while preserving arm signal.
iterations.mechanism_source: Evaluator scoring code marks action frames only when gripper state changes inside the 0.5 to 0.8 m UAV-target band.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally and verified as nonzero duration

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_speed005
iterations.hypothesis: The D1 gain should persist beyond the 5-episode gate.
iterations.mechanism_source: D1 5-episode result restored UAV and arm signals relative to AB timed close.
iterations.media_status: 20 evaluator videos synchronized locally and verified as nonzero duration
iterations.decision: retain as stable non-completion baseline for state-gated close
iterations.boundary: strong total score but still no completion

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_nohold_speed005
iterations.hypothesis: Removing request-state arm hold tests whether D1 gains come from the state gate or from holding evaluator-reported arm state.
iterations.mechanism_source: D1 combines gated close and request-state arm hold after close.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally and verified as nonzero duration
iterations.decision: do not treat request-state hold as the main source of gain
iterations.boundary: slightly lower total and no completion

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_speed004
iterations.hypothesis: A slower state-gated approach may align object interaction better than D1 speed 0.05.
iterations.mechanism_source: Local gate simulation showed speed 0.04 delays close after six suppressed frames and six gated close frames.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally and verified as nonzero duration
iterations.decision: promote because one episode reached completion and total score 95

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_speed004
iterations.hypothesis: The D3 completion event should be tested over 20 episodes before any stronger claim.
iterations.mechanism_source: D3 5-episode gate produced a completion episode whereas D1 did not.
iterations.media_status: 20 evaluator videos synchronized locally and verified as nonzero duration
iterations.decision: promote the speed 0.04 gated branch as the next algorithm-design seed
iterations.boundary: only 1 of 20 episodes completed, so it is not a robust success claim

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_transfer_speed004
iterations.hypothesis: Anchoring hold, lift, transfer, and release to the actual gated close event should repair sparse D3 placement failures.
iterations.mechanism_source: D3 produced only one completed episode in 20 runs, and code inspection showed post-close phases were previously tied to configured close_start_step rather than the real gated close start.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally; original clips are 2 s, and homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop.
iterations.decision: do not promote; container-offset transfer lowered UAV score and did not improve completion
iterations.boundary: negative 5-episode diagnostic; it verifies gate-relative phase anchoring but rejects this aggressive transfer target

iterations.label: ef_resmove_state_gate_lift_standoff_speed004
iterations.hypothesis: Removing D4 container offset while keeping actual-close anchoring and a small lift should preserve D3 approach quality and improve placement completion.
iterations.mechanism_source: D4 rejected aggressive container-offset transfer, so D5 keeps the real gated close anchor but returns transfer_base_mode to standoff with only small post-close lift.
iterations.media_status: 5 evaluator videos synchronized locally; original clips are 2 s, and homepage display uses a 4 s real-frame loop.
iterations.decision: promote to 20-episode stability check before any paper-level claim
iterations.boundary: positive 5-episode diagnostic with 3 of 5 completions, but first and fifth episodes fail, so robustness is not established

next_queue.label: D5 20-episode stability check
next_queue.hypothesis: D5 has a strong 5-episode completion signal, but the failed first and fifth episodes require a 20-episode stability check before promotion.
next_queue.planned_ablation: Run the same D5 settings for 20 episodes and promote only if completion count remains clearly above D3 without safety collapse.

next_queue.label: close-window and release timing sweep
next_queue.hypothesis: D5 failures may come from close-window timing or release timing rather than lift magnitude.
next_queue.planned_ablation: Sweep close_gate_min_distance and close_gate_max_distance around 0.60 to 0.75, then test release_start_step relative to the actual gate start.

media.caption: Timed A+B branch. It keeps arm signal but does not complete.
State-gated close at speed 0.05. It restores UAV and arm scores.
Slower state gate at speed 0.04. This is the only completed diagnostic episode in the 20-episode D3 set.
Gate-relative transfer branch. It proves the close anchor mechanism but lowers score, so it becomes a negative placement-repair ablation.
Gate-relative lift-standoff branch. It removes D4 container offset and gives the strongest current 5-episode completion signal.
